title: bouteloua glandulosa
intro: Bouteloua glandulosa, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a perennial bunchgrass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high content of volatile oils and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Bouteloua glandulosa have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Herbal preparations of Blue Grama Grass can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and reduce inflammation.
